violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Food equipment not properly maintained. Observed build up on drip edge inside of ice maker. Observed food build up on cutting board bracket on prep top cooler and build up on outfeed wings on conveyor toaster ovens.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in food prep area.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Sandwich wrap storage single use utensil storage and bread drawers etc. in front sandwich assembly area has debris build up.
